title: dyssodia setifolia var. greggii
intro: Dyssodia setifolia var. greggii, also known as Gregg's dyssodia, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dyssodia setifolia var. greggii include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema, due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and flowers are prepared as a tea or used in infusions for medicinal purposes.
